# contentful_locale (Data Source)

Retrieves a Contentful Locale.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "contentful_locale" "default" {
  space_id       = var.contentful_space_id
  environment_id = var.contentful_environment_id
  locale_id      = var.contentful_locale_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) ID of the environment containing the locale.
- `locale_id` (String) ID of the locale.
- `space_id` (String) ID of the space containing the locale.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) Locale code, for example en-US.
- `content_delivery_api` (Boolean) Whether the locale is available through the Content Delivery API.
- `content_management_api` (Boolean) Whether the locale is available through the Content Management API.
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is the environment's default locale.
- `fallback_code` (String) Code of the locale to use as a fallback when this locale is empty.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `internal_code` (String) Contentful internal locale code.
- `name` (String) Name of the locale.
- `optional` (Boolean) Whether the locale can be empty for required localized fields.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
